data.body: REMEDIATION APPLIED (Round-11, 2026-06-29). 7d43: BLOCK fixed (discriminates_novelty bar = per-case 0.5 midpoint + spec gate at_least(2)/epochs:3/coverage 0.8, distinct from runtime T_novel=0.7); child title/body swaps fixed (ec89↔3689 restored to match titles, 3689 de-duplicated vs 4cb9); ownership pinned (cc5b owns T_novel+floor+sidecar-write+evidence-gate; ec89 owns freshness-window+code-change-detection via verified_at_sha; default-on→default-OFF expand-contract); novelty sub-answer arithmetic + fail-safe defined on 150b+epic. b744: WS5/bba6 rewritten with experiment-grounded detector design (semgrep native opengrep YAML; gitleaks via generic SARIF-ingest backend; fail-closed in the consumer not the oracle); WS1/WS2/WS3/WS4/WS6 got targeted ACs (recommend_overlays schema+base-failure fallback; threshold-resolver handoff; merge_findings dedup+overlay_union already-run input+escalation ADR+gate-yaml schema; disabled-shim return + one-way-door correction + stale-refs; staged rollout + coverage-gap vote UX); epic reconciled + disposition comment. d251: epic Round-11 section reconciles the adapter seam to code_review_decision(diff_text,repo_root,ref) [fixes the Round-9/Round-10 contradiction], webhook-no-diff base64 REST fetch (PROVEN), outbound read credential, SSM scaffolding (alert-endpoint+bot-token), EC2-role/gerrit.config/DLM ownership contracts, BSL citation; S1/S4a/S4b/S5 child ACs added; disposition comment (incl. already-addressed items justified). All edited tickets pass check-ac. NEXT: re-run rebar review-plan on all 3 to validate (edits invalidated d251/b744 prior PASS signatures; expect 7d43 BLOCK to clear).
